subject: Thank you !!!
body:
Jeffrey,
Thank you SO much for the thoughtful digital stethoscope! I can hear again ;)
Attached here FYI is a link to this week's obit, which you've probably seen already, for algebraic geometry's founder---something you mentioned specifically for Caitlin. FYI she just declared math as her major. She is taking discrete math next semester (along with linear algebra) which to my reading seems to have some algebraic geometry as part of it.
Thinking of you sweating in the Caribbean sun,
Warm regards,
Woody
PS: any dengue/chikingunya on your island? 

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

> From: Kathy Merrell <khmerrell@me.com>
> Date: November 18, 2014 at 10:54:59 PM EST
> To: Woody Email <docmerrell@msn.com>
> Subject: obit
> 
> http://www.nytimes.com/2014/11/16/world/europe/alexander-grothendieck-math-enigma-dies-at-86.html?ref=obituaries
